title: Fake PASS without evidence - verdict claimed without proof
description: Task or check marked as PASS but no evidence file, screenshot, or test result exists to prove it
symptoms: PASS verdict in report but no evidence_path
Green status but nothing to click/verify
Owner cannot confirm what was actually checked
root_cause: Script returns PASS without generating evidence artifact

fix.description: Require evidence for every PASS verdict
steps: Every PASS must have evidence_path in output
Evidence file must exist at that path
Evidence must be generated at same time as verdict
